raw_consumer_statement:
After spending 2+ hours on a call from CITI bank disputing fraudulent charges to my account on XX/XX/XXXX, I was told a new card would be issued and that I would receive it in a few days, however this did not happen. When I called days later on the XXXX for a status, I was told there were yet new charges for thousands of dollars. The account apparently remained open, and more fraudulent charges were made. When I questioned why the account was still open to fraud, I received no explanation, other than that a new investigation was still needed. I called back days later on the XXXX, I was told there were yet additional charges ( fraudulent ), which I again disputed. Apparently, the charges are still not cleared, and the account still not closed but was told locked at this point and to call back in 48 hours to pay the balance owed and close the account. I called on XX/XX/XXXX, I asked to pay the debt I knew I owed, an amount of {$480.00} and that I did not want to do business with CITI ever again and forget a new credit card. Well, I was told they still needed to do more investigation and would need to call me back. At this point I will admit I lost my cool and she apparently did not want to deal with me, and I was then disconnected. Any assistance will be greatly appreciated in resolving this matter. 

Thank you
